---
name: Suggest a New Model
about: Suggest a generative music model that you think should be included in MusGU+.
  A brief explanation is enough. We will take care of the detailed evaluation.
title: "[New Model] <Model name>"
labels: model suggestion
assignees: ''

---

## Model name
<!-- Required. Example: Magenta RealTime -->

## Links
<!-- Optional. Include the official website, repository, paper, demo, or documentation if available. -->

## Why should this model be included in MusGU+?
<!-- Briefly explain why you think this model is relevant to a musician-centered evaluation framework. -->

## Relevant MusGU+ dimensions
<!-- Optional. Select any that apply. -->
- [ ] Adaptability
- [ ] Usability
- [ ] Controllability

## Relevant features or criteria
<!-- Optional. Select any that apply or add your own. -->
- [ ] Real-time capabilities
- [ ] Workflow integration
- [ ] Interface availability
- [ ] Adaptation / fine-tuning pathways
- [ ] Small / personal datasets
- [ ] Conditioning inputs
- [ ] Time-varying control
- [ ] Feature disentanglement
- [ ] Other:

## Additional notes
<!-- Optional. Anything else maintainers should know? -->
